title: Update README with Author Information
description: Add the author's name and relevant details to the README file to provide project attribution and context.
details: Open the project's README.md file. Add a dedicated 'Author' section near the end (or in the appropriate place according to existing structure). Include the author's full name and, if appropriate, contact information or a link to their profile (e.g., GitHub, email). Ensure the formatting matches the rest of the document and adheres to Markdown best practices.
test_strategy: Review the README in a Markdown viewer to confirm the 'Author' section appears correctly, is free of typos, and does not disrupt existing formatting. Optionally, have another team member review for clarity and consistency.
